videos.headline: Missouri fans storm field after kicker drills 61-yard game winner
videos.description: Missouri kicker Harrison Mevis connects from 61 yards out to win it vs. No. 15 Kansas State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Missouri fans storm field after kicker drills 61-yard game winner) 2023/9/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Phillip Brooks somehow reels in a deflected pass for a K-State TD
videos.description: Phillip Brooks is at the right place at the right time to catch a deflected pass for a Kansas State touchdown.
